Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear people talking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The first bell has rung.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22204 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Is it just me, or have there been more weird people around lately?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22110 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Like the ones with Apathy Syndrome? There are some in my neighborhood, too... It's seriously creepy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Sometimes I wonder what'll happen if I end up like that, and it just depresses me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Maybe we'll be okay if we exercise and improve our stamina.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Actually, I heard that {f 0 1 2}the track team is still accepting new members{f 0 1 27}. Maybe running will make us stronger?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like the track team is[n]recruiting new members...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can learn more about[n]it if I visit their club room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22205 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Oh hey, you know the {f 0 1 2}bookstore{f 0 1 27} at the strip mall? Isn't their grand reopening today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22006 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Yeah, leave Iwatodai Station, go straight for a while, and it's after you cross the crosswalk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}It's almost the new semester, so let's check out more shops in the city![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the bookstore at the strip mall[n]is having a "grand reopening" today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what kinds of[n]books they sell there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22104 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Golden Week starts tomorrow. Do you have any plans?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Eh... Not really. But I'm not gonna miss tomorrow's show![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22106 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Oh, yeah! You're talking about {f 0 1 2}Tanaka's Amazing Commodities{f 0 1 27}, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}When I hear that jingle, I can't resist buying something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I never miss it when it's on {f 0 1 2}Sunday afternoons{f 0 1 27}. I'm about to go broke![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shopping program that[n]airs on Sunday afternoons...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since tomorrow's Sunday, maybe I'll[n]turn on the TV in my room to watch it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}You know, rabbits can die from sadness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22207 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Okay... One, you're not a rabbit. And two, it's not sadness, but loss of appetite.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22409 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}What? No way! I thought for sure it was because of heartbreak![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Oh, speaking of sad... I saw {f 0 1 2}an elementary school kid at Naganaki Shrine{f 0 1 27} the last time I visited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}She looked so sad playing all by herself. I felt sorry for her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An elementary school student[n]alone at Naganaki Shrine...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if she's having[n]some sort of trouble...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22103 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, I think our school might really be haunted![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}A friend of my senpai's friend said that they heard a strange voice after school one day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22207 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}No, don't tell me! I really can't handle ghost stories...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Ugh, I'm getting chills... Maybe I should head to the nurse's office.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22107 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}No way! The nurse's office is THAT teacher's lair! Are you seriously going?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}He'll give you some {f 0 1 2}weird medicine{f 0 1 27}, and you might actually end up feeling worse![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the teacher in the nurse's[n]office hands out weird medicine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what kind of ingredients it uses...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22303 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I heard from a younger guy in my club yesterday that a second-year is getting bullied.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22308 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I don't know... All I heard is that it's pretty serious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I thought our school was peaceful, but I guess stuff like that still happens here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like someone in the same[n]grade as me is getting bullied...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22003 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, did you hear that there's {f 0 1 2}an opening in the art club{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22107 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Really? Did someone transfer schools?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}But it sounds interesting. I'm tired of going straight home. Maybe it's time to join a club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22005 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Let's go check it out after school, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like there's an[n]opening in the art club...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can learn more about[n]them if I visit their club room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22003 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Have you heard of this {f 0 1 2}revenge website{f 0 1 27}?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}If you post someone's name on the website, they'll get revenge for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}It's a 100% guaranteed success rate and completely anonymous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22109 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Seriously!? Give me the URL! I wanna check it out now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22008 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Well, it's just a rumor, so I don't know the details...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Why are you so desperate anyways?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A "revenge website"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if it's a new ghost story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22102 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, did you hear about all those people who were found unconscious recently?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Apparently, a lot of them were couples![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22207 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}What, like they were attempting a double suicide or something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}I guess it's kinda romantic to sleep for eternity with your lover... like Romeo and Juliet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22108 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Nuh-uh, no way! That's not romantic at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Couples were found unconscious together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if it's because of the full moon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22002 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}It's almost summer break. Let's go somewhere for vacation![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22106 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Yeah! I wanna go to the sea, the mountains, everywhere and anywhere![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}But first... we've got finals starting on Tuesday.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}At least we have a break after the exams this time! And summer vacation is just around the corner![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We have finals starting next week...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Good morning... Summer vacation is over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}What a bummer. Why does life suck...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22304 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Haha, sounds like someone has Apathy Syndrome. Well, wouldn't life be easier if you actually did?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}On second thought, you're right. It doesn't sound too bad. At least I wouldn't have to worry about anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}People are getting used[n]to Apathy Syndrome...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Some people seem to think it's awful[n]while others think it's not so bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Yukari Takeba's gonna wear a maid dress for the culture festival![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21509 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Wait, seriously!? Is this a blessing from heaven!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21704 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}The archery team is doing a maid café, and she drew the short straw.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I heard she's not stoked about it, so we gotta go support her, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari seems to be the talk of the town.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It sounds like she's going to dress up[n]as a maid for the culture festival...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21502 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, did you go to the film festival during summer vacation?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21810 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Oh, the one at the Port Island movie theater? Yeah, I watched a bunch of things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}I heard they're gonna {f 0 1 2}have it again next week{f 0 1 27} for just one day. Wanna go?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21508 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}On the 23rd, right? I'll pass on this one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I forgot what the theme this time was, but I remember it was all kiddy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like there's going to be a one-day[n]film festival next week on September 23rd.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should invite[n]someone to come with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22005 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Is it just me, or are there a lot more cases where people lose consciousness recently?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}It's all over the news again, too. The whole thing makes me uncomfortable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}What if it starts happening all over the world...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The number of unconscious[n]people seems to be rising again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22202 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Midterms start next Tuesday. Math is killing me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Sine! Cosine! Tangent![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Sine Cosmos, Cosmos Sin Tan! Sin Cos Cos Sin, Cos Cos Sin Sin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22409 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}What the heck...? What kind of spell are you chanting?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Midterms start next Tuesday...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22408 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}The student council president's father died from an illness, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}I can't even imagine what it's like to lose a parent...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Yeah... I think I'll help my mom with some chores when I get home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I heard the boy who's transferring here today is one hot stud muffin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22006 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Oh yeah! He came to school the other day to submit some paperwork, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}I wonder which class he's in... If our seats are next to each other, we'd have to sit real close to share textbooks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22008 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Well... he's actually going to be in 2-F. We'll just have to go check him out later![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A new student is transferring[n]to 2-F... That's my class.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22201 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}The Kyoto trip is almost here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I don't care much about shrines, but I'm still excited about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22006 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Me too! I want to see deers, and deers, and more deers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22207 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Just deers, eh...? Wait, isn't that in Nara, not Kyoto?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The school trip is next week...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21509 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I was so excited about having next Monday off, but then I remembered {f 0 1 2}career experience week{f 0 1 27} starts Tuesday...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}It's lame we have to work even though we won't get paid... What jobs did you get?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21608 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Tuesday and Wednesday, I've got a construction job. And on Thursday and Friday, I'm at a gas station...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21505 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Dang, that sucks. And a teacher's gonna be keeping an eye on us the whole time, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Career experience week starts[n]Tuesday... Where will my job be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22103 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Did you hear about Mochizuki-kun in Class 2-F?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}His parents got transferred again, so he won't be around anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Oh my god, really? So that's why he was absent yesterday...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22104 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Who would've thought he'd manage to fit in so quickly in just one month. Talk about mysterious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21905 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}My brother has been acting weird lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}When I pressed him for details, he told me {f 0 1 2}he was invited to join the cult{f 0 1 27} at Escapade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21509 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Your brother's always been kinda gloomy, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Anyways, I never would've thought someone all for salvation and stuff would be at a club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21907 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Apparently, this guy's always lurking in the corner of the dance floor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}He's got this crazy look in his eye when he goes off about the "moment of salvation" or whatever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Personally, I'd stay far away from him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone suspicious seems to be persuading[n]people to join a cult at Club Escapade.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably be more[n]careful whenever I go there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21702 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Our career consultation is next week, right? Are you planning to go to a university?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21708 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}"Abroad"...!? This is the first I've heard about that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I-I'm your boyfriend! You have to tell me stuff like this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Our career consultation is next week...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22203 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}So it turns out that cactus I bought at the 100-yen store was fake this whole time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}No wonder it didn't wither. And here I thought I was taking such great care of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22009 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Oh my god, that's hilarious! You put so much effort into watering it, too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}If you want a real plant, get one from a home center or, you know, an actual flower shop.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22307 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Yeah, I think I'll buy one from {f 0 1 2}the flower shop on Port Island{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}I hear they've been selling seedlings for home gardening lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The florist at Port Island Station seems to[n]be selling seedlings for home gardens...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might find new seedlings there.[n]I should check out what's in[n]stock every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21505 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}My parents have been nagging me to stop staying out late at night recently...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}They said they don't want me to end up like those people who suddenly go crazy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21810 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}Oh, you mean Apathy Syndrome?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}But I heard they still don't know what causes it, so what's the point of being careful?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 21506 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Yeah, I know, right? The prime time to hit up the arcade or work a shift is at night, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}And if I can't go to {f 0 1 2}Hagakure at night{f 0 1 27} anymore, then I'll miss out on the taste of happiness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like some stores[n]are open at night, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should go check them out[n]when I have the time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22002 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}What is your class doing for the culture festival?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22204 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}A haunted house! I bet I'll be stuck playing the ghost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22010 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}That doesn't sound too bad. You can just show up and put on the costume. I actually need to practice for a magic show...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}But I also heard a typhoon is on its way, and that it's a big one... Are people really gonna turn up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's almost time for the culture festival...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22003 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, have you heard the rumor about, uh... What was it again? The bathroom?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22208 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}That's old news. Besides, it's just a ghost story, not a rumor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're talking about that one girl, right? The second-year?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}She stopped coming to school and just sits around staring at walls all day long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Whenever her mom tries to talk to her, the only thing she says is, "It's coming... It's coming!"[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22007 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Is that really how the story goes? Eh, whatever. It's probably all made up anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Some disturbing rumors seem to[n]be spreading around the school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22002 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, have you tried that famous beef bowl at Umiushi? It's only available for a limited time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22006 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Yep! But only during fall! Everyone who's anyone has been raving about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Lots of shops have been putting out new products lately, like at MangaStar...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Wait, you really haven't heard about any of this? You've kinda been out of the loop, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sounds like various shops have new products[n]for sale. I should take a look sometime soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22005 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}I've been feeling kinda down lately, so I went to Escapade for a change of pace...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}And someone was selling these brand-new, super cute accessories there![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Sucks I couldn't buy anything though. Everything was wayyy over my budget.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}It's like I have nothing to talk about if I don't buy anything new... Is there anything affordable around here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22205 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}What about Umiushi's new menu item? People have been talking it up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22009 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hm, maybe I'll try it! Gotta stay up to date with the latest trends and all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}Although... it seems like a lot of trends have to do with religion these days...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sounds like some shops have new[n]products out. I should take a look soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22103 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Hey, I think our school might really be haunted![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}A friend of my senpai's friend said that they heard a strange voice after school one day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22207 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}No, don't tell me! I really can't handle ghost stories...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 150}Ugh, I'm getting chills... Maybe I should head to the nurse's office.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_116_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22107 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}No way! The nurse's office is THAT teacher's lair! Are you seriously going?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 100}He'll give you some {f 0 1 2}weird medicine{f 0 1 27}, and you might actually end up feeling worse![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A teacher who gives out weird medicine...[n]Are they talking about Mr. Edogawa?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should visit the nurse's office whenever[n]I'm feeling tired after going to Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
